title: Email notification service sending duplicate messages to users
body: Users are receiving between 2 and 6 duplicate copies of transactional emails — order confirmations, password resets, and shipping notifications. Started approximately 09:15 UTC. Complaint volume in support is high: 47 tickets opened in the last 2 hours. One enterprise customer (Acme Corp) has reported that their users received 6 copies of a password reset email, causing confusion and account lockouts from multiple simultaneous reset attempts. Root cause suspected in the notification-service message deduplication layer — the dedup key TTL may have been reduced or cleared. No visible errors in the notification-service logs, but message queue consumer count increased from 4 to 12 workers following a config change at 09:10 UTC.
